mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.dim_seller ( seller_key, tenant, last_synced_at, business_name, store_name, seller_status, tier, business_type, contact_email, contact_phone, city, state, gstin, gst_verified, pan_verified, bank_account_verified, active_date, commission_rate, health_score, rating, fulfillment_rate, dispatch_sla_pct, return_rate, response_time_hours, violations_count, total_products, active_listings ) SELECT s.id, s.tenant, NOW(), s.business_name, s.store_name, s.state_id, s.tier, s.business_type, s.contact_email, s.contact_phone, s.city, s.state, s.gstin, s.gst_verified, s.pan_verified, s.bank_account_verified, s.active_date, s.commission_rate, COALESCE(sc.health_score, 0), s.rating, s.fulfillment_rate, COALESCE(sc.dispatch_sla_pct, 0), COALESCE(sc.return_rate, 0), COALESCE(sc.response_time_hours, 0), COALESCE(sc.violations_count, 0), COALESCE(prod_agg.total_products, 0), COALESCE(prod_agg.active_listings, 0) FROM hm_supplier.supplier s LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT health_score, dispatch_sla_pct, return_rate, response_time_hours, violations_count FROM hm_seller_analytics.seller_scorecards WHERE supplier_id = s.id ORDER BY period_end DESC LIMIT 1 ) sc ON true LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT COUNT(*) as total_products, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state_id = 'PUBLISHED') as active_listings FROM hm_product.products WHERE supplier_id = s.id ) prod_agg ON true

INSERT INTO hm_query.seller_dashboard_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, seller_id, user_id, business_name, store_name, seller_status, tier, business_type, contact_email, contact_phone, city, state, gstin, gst_verified, pan_verified, bank_account_verified, active_date, commission_rate, health_score, rating, fulfillment_rate, dispatch_sla_pct, delivery_sla_pct, return_rate, response_time_hours, cancellation_rate, violations_count, total_products, active_listings, gmv_30d, orders_30d, revenue_30d, pending_payout, payout_frequency, avg_lead_time_days ) SELECT s.id, s.tenant, NOW(), s.id, s.user_id, s.business_name, s.store_name, s.state_id, s.tier, s.business_type, s.contact_email, s.contact_phone, s.city, s.state, s.gstin, s.gst_verified, s.pan_verified, s.bank_account_verified, s.active_date, s.commission_rate, COALESCE(sc.health_score, 0), s.rating, s.fulfillment_rate, COALESCE(sc.dispatch_sla_pct, 0), COALESCE(sc.delivery_sla_pct, 0), COALESCE(sc.return_rate, 0), COALESCE(sc.response_time_hours, 0), COALESCE(sc.cancellation_rate, 0), COALESCE(sc.violations_count, 0), COALESCE(prod_agg.total_products, 0), COALESCE(prod_agg.active_listings, 0), COALESCE(sales_agg.gmv_30d, 0), COALESCE(sales_agg.orders_30d, 0), COALESCE(sales_agg.revenue_30d, 0), 0, s.payout_frequency, COALESCE(s.avg_shipping_days, 0) FROM hm_supplier.supplier s LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT health_score, dispatch_sla_pct, delivery_sla_pct, return_rate, response_time_hours, cancellation_rate, violations_count FROM hm_seller_analytics.seller_scorecards WHERE supplier_id = s.id ORDER BY period_end DESC LIMIT 1 ) sc ON true LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT COUNT(*) as total_products, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state_id = 'PUBLISHED') as active_listings FROM hm_product.products WHERE supplier_id = s.id ) prod_agg ON true LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) as gmv_30d, COUNT(*) as orders_30d, COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) as revenue_30d FROM hm_order.orders o JOIN hm_order.order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id WHERE oi.supplier_id = s.id AND o.created_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' ) sales_agg ON true
